account.title: account
account.cancel_warning: ⚠ scheduled to cancel at period end

pricing.title: pricing
pricing.subtitle: Monthly subscription · 14-day free trial · card on file, first charge after trial ends
pricing.footer: Subscription fee covers seats + product access. GPU/TPU compute runs on Google Cloud (Vertex AI · Cloud Run · GKE) and is billed by actual usage — no RunPod, no Vast.ai, no third-party GPU broker.
pricing.gcp_subtitle: Public list prices, us-central1. Billed directly by Google — varies by region, sustained-use discount, committed-use discount, and free tier.
pricing.gcp_disclaimer: Snapshot for reference. Authoritative pricing: cloud.google.com/pricing. Free tier covers most discover-stage usage.

dashboard.title: workbench
dashboard.assist_note: Gemini drafts only — verify stays deterministic (0 LLM verdicts).

landing.title: The AI-native technical-design pipeline
landing.sub: spec → structure → design → analyze → synthesize → verify → handoff. One production loop across atoms, materials, chips, bio, and chemistry.
landing.pipeline_sub: discover seeds it; verify closes it. Every stage is a deterministic surface — not a chat.
landing.feat_verify_body: A 5-tier calculator returns the verdict — zero LLM judgments. Every claim carries its provenance.
landing.feat_i18n_body: Primitives proven in one domain carry into the next — the NEXUS reuse lattice (e.g. RTSC current_loop → ANTIMATTER trap). Redo work goes to zero.
landing.feat_gcp_body: Vertex AI · Cloud Run · Firestore · Secret Manager. Metadata-server auth — zero secrets in code.
